passing_score_scale: Scaled score (passing threshold varies by exam; set by DANB standard setting process)

testing_centers.notes: In-person testing at Pearson VUE authorized test centers nationwide. Schedule at home.pearsonvue.com/danb. Government-issued photo ID required.

id_requirements: Government-issued photo ID with photo and signature required. Name on ID must match registration exactly.
exam_rules: Closed book; no reference materials or calculators permitted. All DANB exams are administered at Pearson VUE test centers. Candidate must present valid government-issued photo ID. Personal items must be stored in a locker during the exam.
renewal_options: CDA certification is valid for 2 years. Renewal requires 12 continuing education (CE) hours per 2-year cycle. CE hours must be completed through DANB-approved providers. Renewal applications submitted through the DANB online portal.

prerequisites.description: Current DANB CDA or RDA certification; completion of an approved expanded functions dental assisting program

retake_policy.notes: 90-day waiting period between failed attempts. No stated limit on total attempts. Each retake requires a new exam registration fee.

domains.name: Expanded Functions Legal and Ethical Standards

official_study_resources.title: DANB Candidate Guide
official_study_resources.notes: Free candidate guides and content outlines available at danb.org

official_study_resources.title: DANB Practice Tests
official_study_resources.notes: Official DANB practice tests available for purchase through the DANB portal
